channel.title: Web on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Web on TLDRBins

item.title: Curl
item.description: Advance curl # Url encode POST data curl --data-urlencode 'cmd=ping -c3 10.10.14.10' http://10.10.11.10/cmd.php # PUT request with a file curl -X PUT http://10.10.11.10/test.txt -d @test.txt # PUT request with a file (with creds) curl -X PUT http://user:password@10.10.11.10/test.txt -d @test.txt # Upload as binary (preserve newlines and control characters) curl -X PUT http://10.10.11.10/test.txt --data-binary @test.aspx # POST request with form param `file` and attach a file curl -X POST -F "file=@shell.

item.title: Squid Proxy
item.description: Config location /etc/squid/squid.conf Connect via FoxyProxy Firefox plugin +------------------------+ |Settings | +------------------------+ |Title : squid proxy| |Proxy Type : HTTP | |Proxy IP : 10.10.11.10| |Port : 3128 | |Username : (If any) | |Password : (If any) | +------------------------+ # Connect http://10.10.11.10 http://127.0.0.1 Internal ports scan via proxy # 1. Take note of word size, then Ctrl+C wfuzz -z range,1-1000 -p 10.10.11.10:3128:HTTP -u http://127.0.0.1:FUZZ # 2. Re-run with word size filter wfuzz -z range,1-65535 -p 10.

item.title: Subdomain Enum
item.description: wfuzz download wfuzz # HTTP wfuzz -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt -H "Host: FUZZ.example.com" -u http://example.com # HTTPS wfuzz -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt -H "Host: FUZZ.example.com" -u https://example.com -k Take note of the word size, Ctrl+C to interrupt the process, then run again wfuzz -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt -H "Host: FUZZ.example.com" -u http://example.com --hw 10 gobuster gobuster vhost -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/bitquark-subdomains-top100000.txt -u http://example.com Add domain/subdomain to /etc/hosts echo "10.10.11.10 example.com" | sudo tee -a /etc/hosts

item.title: Web Directory Enum
item.description: feroxbuster Download feroxbuster HTTP feroxbuster -u http://example.com/ --depth 1 --methods=GET,POST -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt HTTPS feroxbuster -u https://example.com/ -k --depth 1 --methods=GET,POST -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt Specify Extension feroxbuster -u http://example.com/ --methods=GET,POST --depth=1 -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -x html, asp, aspx Add trailing slash / to each request feroxbuster -u http://example.com/ -f --depth 1 --methods=GET,POST -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt wfuzz Fuzzing Number Range wfuzz -z range,1-99 http://example.com/users/FUZZ gobuster Download gobuster gobuster dir -u http://example.com -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -t 40 -x php

item.title: Webdav
item.description: davtest Download davtest # Without creds davtest -url http://10.10.11.10 # With creds davtest -url http://10.10.11.10 -auth user:password curl # Rename a remote file curl -X MOVE -H 'Destination:http://example.com/test.php' http://example.com/test.txt
